mapper.select: SELECT * FROM play_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY play_time DESC
SELECT * FROM play_record WHERE movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY play_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE movie SET play_count = play_count + 1 WHERE id = #{movieId}
mapper.select: SELECT movie_id, COUNT(*) as play_count FROM play_record WHERE play_time >= #{startTime} AND play_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY movie_id ORDER BY play_count DESC LIMIT 10
